item.title: "Brainrot fruits" primarily refers to a surreal internet trend featuring AI-generated, anthropomorphic fruits engaging in nonsensical, highly saturated, and often dramatic situations. Popularized on TikTok and Instagram, these videos generally use Gen-Z s
